message:
feat(showcase): update snapshots + e2e for mouse capture toggle (bd-iuvb.17.1)

Status bar now shows Mouse:ON/OFF indicator, requiring snapshot updates.
Mouse e2e test updated to use Down+Up click sequence matching new
mouse infrastructure (click activation on MouseUp).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
